Starting implementation of configuration system
Successfully implemented configuration system with Config/Project structs, InitConfig/LoadConfig/SaveConfig functions, and comprehensive tests. All 6 tests pass.
Starting implementation of git worktree discovery package

Successfully implemented git worktree discovery package with Worktree struct (Path, Branch, Commit, IsPrimary) and ListWorktrees function. Parses 'git worktree list --porcelain' output correctly. All 8 tests passing including integration tests for real git operations, detached HEAD, bare repos, and error cases.
Starting implementation of git status functionality
Successfully implemented GitStatus struct with GetStatus function, updated Worktree struct to include Status field, and added comprehensive tests. All tests passing.
Starting TUI implementation with bubbletea

TUI implementation complete with bubbletea and lipgloss. All acceptance criteria met: model and view files created, keyboard navigation implemented, status indicators working (*, ↑, ↓), project/worktree hierarchy rendered. Build successful.
Starting implementation of VS Code integration
Implemented VS Code integration: Created pkg/vscode/vscode.go with OpenInVSCode function. Integrated into TUI for 'o' and Enter keys. Error handling via vsCodeErrorMsg. Build successful.

Successfully implemented worktree creation with text input UI. Created operations.go with CreateWorktree function, added text input mode to TUI model with charmbracelet/bubbles textinput, updated view to show input prompt, and implemented worktree refresh after creation. Build succeeds with no errors.
Implemented worktree creation with text input UI. All acceptance criteria met. Build successful.
Implemented DeleteWorktree function in operations.go, added confirmation dialog to TUI with y/n prompt, prevents deletion of primary worktrees, refreshes list after deletion
Starting implementation of Cobra CLI structure
Successfully implemented Cobra CLI structure with root command, config subcommands (add, list, init), persistent --config flag, and main.go integration. All acceptance criteria verified.
Created all documentation files: README.md, Makefile, example-config.yaml. All files tested and working.
Claimed by agent - implementing collapsible project nodes
Successfully implemented collapsible project nodes with keyboard shortcuts (space, enter, left/right arrows). All projects default to collapsed state. Visual indicators (▸/▾) show expansion state.
Starting work on dynamic border box sizing

Implemented dynamic border box sizing: Added width/height fields to Model struct, handle WindowSizeMsg to track terminal dimensions, calculate dynamic box width (terminal width - 4, min 45, max 120) in View function. Box now adapts to terminal width while maintaining readability with minimum and maximum constraints.

Modified OpenInVSCode to check for .code-workspace files first. Implementation: (1) Added resolveTargetPath helper that scans directory for *.code-workspace files, (2) If found, returns alphabetically first workspace file, (3) Falls back to directory if none found or on errors, (4) All acceptance criteria met: deterministic selection, graceful error handling, fallback behavior preserved. Build and tests passing.
Starting investigation of worktree discovery logic

Verified that ListWorktrees() uses 'git worktree list --porcelain' without path assumptions. Discovery works regardless of worktree location. All tests pass. The .worktrees convention in createWorktree() is only for creation, not discovery.

Implemented optional destination parameter for worktree creation. Modified CreateWorktree in operations.go to accept empty string for default path or custom path (relative/absolute). Updated TUI to use two-step input: 1) branch name, 2) optional destination path. When path is empty, defaults to projectPath/.worktrees/branchName. Relative paths resolved relative to project root. Build successful, no errors.

Successfully implemented category support. Added Category field to Project struct, Categories field to Config struct, implemented all CLI commands (category list/set/add), updated example-config.yaml with examples, and verified backward compatibility with projects without categories. All tests pass.
Starting implementation of category hierarchy in TUI

Successfully implemented three-level category hierarchy in TUI. Categories display as top-level nodes in configured order, projects grouped under categories, uncategorized projects at bottom. Added visual distinction with orange category nodes vs green project nodes. All keyboard navigation works across all three levels. Tests pass.
Starting implementation of search/filter feature

Successfully implemented search/filter feature for TUI. Added search mode with '/' key, real-time filtering by project name/worktree/tags/category, Enter to keep filter applied, Esc handling for different modes. All tests passing.
